title: Man-in-the-Middle Attack Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the steps of a Man-in-the-Middle (MitM) attack, showing how an attacker secretly intercepts and potentially alters communication between two parties.
relationships: Client connects to public network unaware of attacker
Attacker positions themselves between client and server
Attacker intercepts and decrypts traffic using a fake certificate
Attacker relays (and potentially alters) information to the server
Server responds to attacker, thinking it's the client
Attacker relays (and potentially alters) information back to the client
